You are playing Heads-Up Texas Hold'em Lite (no-limit style, one hand). Each player starts with 200 chips; small blind 1, big blind 2. You are dealt two private hole cards; five community cards are revealed across preflop, flop, turn, and river. Make the best five-card hand at showdown.
Actions:
  fold  - give up the hand
  check - pass (only when there is no bet to call)
  call  - match the current bet
  bet N - bet when no bet is facing you; N = your TOTAL chips committed this street
  raise N - raise a facing bet; N = your TOTAL chips committed this street (raise-TO)
  all_in - commit your entire remaining stack
N must be an integer within the stated legal range.
